title: ai-badger stack metadata
description: Optional per-stack metadata (<stack>/stack.json): detection signals and default commands used by detect.py, folded into index.json.stacks[stack].meta.

detectionSignals.description: Human/heuristic hints (e.g. 'react in package.json dependencies', '*.tsx') detect.py uses to auto-select this stack.

requires.description: Other stacks implied by this one (e.g. react requires ts+node).

commands.description: Default build/test/lint/run commands this stack contributes to config.json.
